title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: AI Master argues that current AI models have mathematical ceilings preventing AGI achievement through scaling alone. The video examines transformer limitations, the Time Hierarchy Theorem, chain-of-thought reasoning shortcomings, and autonomous agent error accumulation to challenge AGI timelines and industry hype.
